name: blender-node-diagram/concept
title: Blinn-Phong Vector Diagram
description: Static illustration of the N, L, V, H vector geometry at a Blinn-Phong shading point. No scripting required — the SVG is saved directly into the post HTML.

caption.default: The half-vector H bisects L and V. When H aligns with N (θ = 0), the highlight is at peak brightness.
